arts.sum: This fixture hasn't taken place for 18 years.

arts.ttl: 'Especially': Chris Sutton thinks Ollie Watkins could be very annoyed by what's set to happen on England duty
arts.sum: England face Greece on Thursday evening, and Lee Carsley has a big decision to make heading into this match. Indeed, with Harry Kane sidelined through...

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish reveals which England teammate he will never ask to babysit new daughter
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has revealed which of his England teammates he will never ask to babysit his new baby daughter.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish explains why he'll never ask Bukayo Saka to babysit his daughter
arts.sum: As Jack Grealish throws himself into fatherhood, he was asked which of his England team-mates he would least like to look after his child ahead of their home clash against Greece in the Nations League

arts.ttl: Newcastle have last laugh with latest Guehi update
arts.sum: Newcastle supporters have enjoyed the latest update concerning Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi . Guehi's contract is up in June 2025 and there now concerns at Palace that he will not sign a fresh deal.

arts.ttl: George Baldock to be honoured during England vs Greece match at Wembley as plans announced
arts.sum: England and Greece will hold a minute silence before their clash at Wembley in honour of George Baldock with both teams also wearing black armbands on Thursday night

arts.ttl: England make Harry Kane injury decision for Greece clash
arts.sum: England have another match against Finland on Sunday and Carsley has revealed his skipper won't start in the first fixture, but didn't rule the former Tottenham Hotspur star completely out of contention. Interim England manager Lee Carsley says Harry Kane will not start in their Nations League clash with Greece on Thursday night after failing to fully recover from the injury he suffered at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Former England manager Gareth Southgate says he won't coach in the next year
arts.sum: Former England coach Gareth Southgate said Thursday he will be taking a year away from a club or national team job, after speculation he could be a target for Manchester United. Southgate stepped down from the England job in July, two days after losing in the final of the European Championship for the second straight tournament.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley: The man behind the England manager, by those who know him best
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and David Moyes among those to praise ex-Under-21s boss as he auditions for the full-time Three Lions job

arts.ttl: Liverpool eye three Trent Alexander-Arnold replacements as Real Madrid increasingly confident of transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are understood to be preparing for life without star right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold as they eye up Jeremie Frimpong, Vanderson and Michael Kayode as potential transfer targets in that position. CaughtOffside understands there is currently something of a standstill in Alexander-Arnold’s contract talks with Liverpool, even if the Reds are keen to discuss new deals […] The post Liverpool eye three Trent Alexander-Arnold replacements as Real Madrid increasingly confident of transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.
